text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm. And so, the rescue scene ends<n>in failure!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh! Ah, yes, I knew it. I<n>knew it all along!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A theatrical twist! You desired to<n>compose a
tragedy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You've flown too close to the sun<n>that is I and,
thus, have lost your<n>wings! A brilliant metaphor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, you poor souls behind this<n>glass! Forgive my
corruptible<n>radiance!
